$comment: Claude shorthands and codex-family shorthands are mapped to openai/gpt-5.4 because (a) Claude is not first-class in opencode (Anthropic blocked opencode client spoofing in January 2026; opencode 1.3.0 removed the built-in Anthropic OAuth plugin) and (b) GPT-5.4 is a strict superset of GPT-5.3-Codex per OpenAI's own docs (GPT-5.4 Thinking incorporates the coding capabilities of GPT-5.3-Codex). Users who want differently-tuned models can override this file with scripts/opencode_model_aliases.local.json (gitignored). Users who prefer opencode-zen gateway routing can swap 'openai/' for 'opencode/' in the overrides.
